last_result.effect: EasyCrypt accepted a proof-state change; the refreshed view is based on the new committed state.
last_result.proof_state: The committed EasyCrypt proof state changed.

lines: &1 (left ) : {i : int, s, pi : block, p, c : block list} [programs are in sync]
&2 (right) : {i : int, s, pi : block, p, c : block list}
forall (qs_L : block fset) (m_L : (block, block) fmap) (c_L : block list)
(!bad_R => (s_L = s_R /\ c_L = c_R /\ qs_L = qs_R) /\ fdom m_L = qs_L) =>
!bad_R => c_L = c_R /\ qs_L = qs_R /\ fdom m_L = qs_L

source.label: Parsed from EasyCrypt pretty goal text

surface_profile.name: l1_goal_projection
surface_profile.description: L1 Goal-State Projection: manager transport of ONLY the current goal. No status, no manager-result section, no focus — the agent sees the raw goal and nothing else (the node-memory recovery anchor and the one-line submit-intent reminder are the only scaffolding).
